text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Fuji Kiseki is doing some magic tricks
for a younger student.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And when I cast a little spell on this coin...
Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it's really gone! How'd you do that?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: By using my magic, of course. Now, if I do this...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whoops... Apologies. It seems I've run out of
magic for today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll astound you with even more dazzling tricks
next time, so look forward to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How could I have fumbled that? She must've been so disappointed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's sleight of hand isn't quite up to snuff,
and she grows despondent over failing to wow the
younger student.
